flashcards.back: For any node, all values in the left subtree are less than the node's value, and all values in the right subtree are greater.

flashcards.front: What are the three cases for BST deletion?
flashcards.back: 1. Node with no children (leaf) 2. Node with one child 3. Node with two children

flashcards.front: Where is the minimum value located in a BST?
flashcards.back: In the leftmost node of the tree

flashcards.front: Where is the maximum value located in a BST?
flashcards.back: In the rightmost node of the tree

flashcards.front: What is the time complexity of BST operations in a balanced tree?
flashcards.back: O(log n) for insertion, deletion, and search operations
